updates.tweet_text:
All the action went to the Sunday opening traders in #ES_F and now literally 0 to do but ride runner. Two longs were given: The 7483 test then 7490 recovery (triggered) and the 7506 recovery (triggered). 7534-39 massive resistance was target, hit

7546, 7554, 7575 magnet next https://t.co/SOtEtjmaSU

updates.tweet_text:
All the work for today was done off Sunday's open in #ES_F, as it is with every single Sunday gap down (100% bear traps). 7483 was support (held last eve) with 7490 reclaims triggering up. Targets were 7534-39 massive res (hit)

Next up were 7546 (hit), 7554, 7575 next. 75=magnet https://t.co/mo1eSWeVuq
updates.notes: All prices mentioned (7483, 7490, 7534-39, 7546, 7554, 7575) are observations of price action already hit or reaffirmations of morning-plan levels. No new actionable levels introduced.

updates.tweet_text: @tradivate Its always the same - bearish weekend headlines, twitter (which is 99% retail traders who are therefore always on the wrong side) gets extremely bearish, just provides extremely easy liquidity for institutions to use off the Sunday open
updates.notes: Pure market commentary about retail sentiment and institutional liquidity; no price levels named or actionable triggers mentioned.

updates.tweet_text: @Taylor8xeno8 @InstinctTrades Yes no wrong way to trade! My runners are 10% and my cost basis is down in the 7490's. large embedded profit, would be 0 reason whatsoever to arbitrarily sell a runner because of a routine intraday dip when no structure was lost

updates.tweet_text:

updates.tweet_text: Closing update #ES_F: Final hour and we are back to 7490 big support. Watch for traps here and ES will need to recover 7506 with speed to start back up to 7534-39 target (hit), 7546 (hit), then 7554, 7575 (not yet). Newsletter just sent with newest entries. Big zone right here

updates.tweet_text:

Plan today: Ride runner until vol expands. 7522, 7532, 7548 next set. 7490=support https://t.co/02HqiWQHKX
